flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cleveland Community College fell 68% between 2021 and 2024 (63.0% → 20.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cleveland Community College fell 48% between 2006 and 2009 (29.1% → 15.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cleveland Community College fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Cleveland Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.6k).
